title: Banandez Optimized
description: A modpack with every essential you need, it has pvp essentials, visuals while keeping the game extremely vanilla (youll barely notice a difference), and most importantly; optimized for best preformance!
body:
# 📖 Description
The first optimiation pack made by Banandez!
Focused for the best gameplay and performance, with mods to help **reduce lag** and **increase render distance on servers...**
Great for playing on servers with friends or single player worlds!
# ⚡ Preformance
If you looking for a modpack to get you better **FPS** than this is the one! Just on average you can go from **30** on vannilla to a rounded of **300**! **Great for anyone who plays on laptop or doesnt have a proper PC.** With the increased render distance **you can also go past the server limit of 10 chuncks to whatever you set yours at.**

**Preformance Details:**
-Render Distance; on servers with a render distance cap you can bypass it by loading chunks into match what you actually have your render distance set too & more.
-Memory usage; optimizes memory usage by not loading mobs you cant see & more!
# ✨ Visuals
Adds a few mods to enhance your single/multiplayer experience with you barely being able to notice while also not costing any extra preformance issues.
# ⚔️ PVP
Comes with a centered crosshair to make aim more accurate, armor hud, sprint toggle displays, apple skin (shows foods saturation) and more to make pvp smoother and easier.
I also usually put in my texture pack which has low fire, shield and other pvp stuff etc.
# 📃 Extra Information
**This modpack is client-sided and uses fabric**, this modpack also includes **a couple texture packs for PvP** to give the overall best experience for the user.

# NEW CUSTOM CAPE
We added a new custom cape that you can only wear while getting a version with the cape in it _(will be labeld)_ with banandez optimized!

Heres how to equip it if now already equipped:

Navigate to **options** then to **skin customization**, once your there click the **red cape icon** next to the "cape: on" setting

![Click this to change cape once in "skin customization" setting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db14d66b71e8a13390644272db6bf61363eca4eb.png)

Then click through the cape options/providers until you reach **default (local)**, then your cape will be equipped.

### CAPE IN GAME:

![Cape in game:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2622fcbd523cdd81c51d1109a74dc95c51564f7_0.webp)

Banandez Optimized aims toward being a client like modpack with everything you need to make your game smooth and better at pvp!


I know all the packs people want and use now a days and im still working on adding all the mods people want into this pack while keeping it vanilla!


**btw**:
_I was very lazy on some older versions so you may find random texture packs and stuff in it but Im trying to be more preffesional now!_
